◎简　　介  

　　Newly divorced, battered by the media, betrayed by friends, 8 term Congressman Charlie Winship is tired of Washington politics and the corruption of the special interest lobbyists. Only upon meeting his constituents on Catatonk island lying 20 miles off the Maine coast does Charlie finds the strength once again to fight the good fight and find a love interest to fill his heart....
